team.title: Leadership
team.description: A synergy of Ph.D. scholars, industry veterans, and strategic visionaries.

member1.name: Dr. R. Amartuvshin
member1.bio: Holds a Ph.D. in Mechatronics and Robotics from Japan. An Associate Professor at the National University of Mongolia, he is a leading scientist contributing to the development of robotics in Mongolia.

member2.name: S. Erdenebat
member2.bio: Founder of Startup Mongolia NGO and a technology entrepreneur. An expert contributing significantly to strategy, investment, and the development of the startup ecosystem.

member3.name: Ts. Munkhtsogt
member3.bio: Founder of UBCab and Mongol Computing LLC. A computer engineer with over 10 years of experience in the technology sector and extensive expertise in product development.
